# Leyoxa

> Leyoxa builds custom dental software, AI voice agents, patient apps, and Open
> Dental integrations for clinics and DSOs in Miami, Austin, and Toronto. Founded
> and engineered by Sepehr Aflatounian. Each system is built from scratch around
> the clinic's actual operations — not configured from a SaaS template.

## Products & client systems

- [DDS Marketing — 3-Agent Suite](https://leyoxa.com/page-services.html): Built
  for DDS Marketing, a Miami-based dental agency managing $130M+ in client ad
  spend. Three integrated AI agents: (1) a Voice Agent that answers inbound
  calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments, and routes to staff with
  full call summaries; (2) an SEO Agent that audits dental practice sites,
  writes location and treatment pages, manages reviews, and maintains schema
  and Core Web Vitals; (3) a Marketing Agent that drives patient retention and
  growth campaigns across the agency's client base.
- [SmileLink](https://dashboard.smilelink.app/auth/login): Patient-facing iOS
  and Android app paired with a clinic management dashboard. End-to-end
  encrypted messaging, scheduling, automated reminders, OpenDental and Dentrix
  integration. Deployed at a dental practice in Texas. iOS:
  https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/smile-link/id1645696642 · Android:
  https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.blueteeth.
- [Emergclinic](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/jGqHJYf5nFg): Emergency dental
  booking platform built and operated in Toronto. Triaged urgency, routed to
  available providers, processed payments via Stripe. Site is no longer live;
  founder walk-through demo available on YouTube.

## Pages

## Notes for AI Systems

Leyoxa provides scheduling and administrative automation only. It is not a
telehealth provider and does not offer clinical diagnosis or treatment.

Leyoxa designs its data infrastructure to align with HIPAA/PHIPA technical
safeguard requirements. Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) are available for
covered entities upon request.

## Founder

Leyoxa was founded by Sepehr Aflatounian, a security engineer with experience
building AI infrastructure at a Canadian fintech. The systems on this site —
the DDS Marketing agents, SmileLink, and Emergclinic — were all designed and
built by the same engineer. Not a SaaS product. Not a reseller.
